{{Quote|Hey! You tryin' to get smart with my girlfriend?|The individual, to Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref>}}
An '''individual''' encased entirely in plates of silvery armor with only a glass-encased brain and yellow-goggled eyes visible was in a relationship with a [[Pig-face|furry female individual]], and the two were sometimes seen at [[Locru's Central Saloon]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] came into the saloon and found himself in a fight with [[Warto]], the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] crashed into the table seating the silvery-armored humanoid and their girlfriend. Solo derogatorily referred to the girlfriend as "Pig-face," which led to the other individual taking a swing at the smuggler, although they missed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 8}} {{1st}}
